name: Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare one nine inch deep dish pie shell. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. PUDDING
a. Separate eggs and set whites aside for meringue.
b. Mix egg yolks, sugar, corn starch, milk, vanilla, and butter.
c. Stir in 1 cup of shredded coconut.
d. Cook the mixture until thick, stirring constantly, in the top of a double boiler.
e. Pour pudding into the previously prepared deep dish pie shell.
3. MERINGUE
a. Beat egg whites and 2 tsp cream of tartar until foamy.
b. Slowly beat in 6 tbsp sugar, 1 tbsp at a time.
c. Continue beating until stiff and glossy.
d. Beat in 1 tsp vanilla.
e. Heap meringue onto the top of the pie filling.
f. Carefully seal the meringue to the edge of the pie crust to prevent shrinking or weeping.
g. Top meringue with 3 tbsp shredded coconut.
4. Bake the pie at 350°F until the meringue is a delicate brown color. Cool the pie away from draft.
